FROM (
   SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS cnt
   FROM (

      SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
      UNION ALL

94:
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT MAX(avg_sal) - MIN(avg_sal)
        FROM (SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_sal
              FROM account a2
              LEFT JOIN loan l ON a2.account_id = l.account_id
              GROUP BY a2.account_id)) AS gap
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')
  AND (SELECT AVG(l.amount)
       FROM loan l
       WHERE l.account_id = a.account_id) = (
         SELECT MIN(avg_sal)
         FROM (SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_sal
               FROM account a2
               LEFT JOIN loan l ON a2.account_id = l.account_id
               GROUP BY a2.account_id)
       );	----- bird -----	financial
95:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON c.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE (c.year, c.month, c.day) = (
    SELECT c2.year, c2.month, c2.day
    FROM client c2
    ORDER BY c2.year DESC, c2.month DESC, c2.day DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d

SELECT 
   CAST(carcinogenic_cnt AS REAL) * 100.0 / total_cnt AS percentage
FROM (
   SELECT 
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
         SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
         FROM bond b
         JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
         JOIN atom a1 ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
         JOIN atom a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
         WHERE b.bond_type = '#' AND (a1.element = 'h' OR a2.element = 'h')
      )) AS total_cnt,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
         SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
         FROM bond b
         JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
         JOIN atom a1 ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
         JOIN atom a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
         WHERE b.bond_type = '#' AND (a1.element = 'h' OR a2.element = 'h')
         JOIN molecule m ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
         WHERE m.label = '+'
      )) AS carcinogenic_cnt
);	----- bird -----	toxicology

1481:
WITH min_cons AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, MIN(ym.Consumption) AS min_consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
count_min AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND ym.Consumption = (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_cons mv WHERE mv.Segment = c.Segment)
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
total_cons AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS tot
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
annual_avg AS (
  SELECT tc.Segment, tc.tot / cm.cnt AS avg_consumption
  FROM total_cons tc
  JOIN count_min cm ON tc.Segment = cm.Segment
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WHERE t.ProductID = 2 AND t.Amount = 1
ORDER BY t.Price DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1533:
SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE ProductID = 5
      AND Amount <> 0
      AND Price / Amount > 29.0
) p ON y.CustomerID = p.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date = '201208';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
